endpoints.name: GET /#Action=CreateDomain
endpoints.description: Creates a new search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=CreateDomain
endpoints.description: Creates a new search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DefineIndexField
endpoints.description: Configures an IndexField for the search domain. Used to create new fields and modify existing ones. If the field exists, the new configuration replaces the old one. You can configure a maximum of 200 index fields.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DefineIndexField
endpoints.description: Configures an IndexField for the search domain. Used to create new fields and modify existing ones. If the field exists, the new configuration replaces the old one. You can configure a maximum of 200 index fields.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DefineRankExpression
endpoints.description: Configures a RankExpression for the search domain. Used to create new rank expressions and modify existing ones. If the expression exists, the new configuration replaces the old one. You can configure a maximum of 50 rank expressions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DefineRankExpression
endpoints.description: Configures a RankExpression for the search domain. Used to create new rank expressions and modify existing ones. If the expression exists, the new configuration replaces the old one. You can configure a maximum of 50 rank expressions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DeleteDomain
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a search domain and all of its data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DeleteDomain
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a search domain and all of its data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DeleteIndexField
endpoints.description: Removes an IndexField from the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DeleteIndexField
endpoints.description: Removes an IndexField from the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DeleteRankExpression
endpoints.description: Removes a RankExpression from the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DeleteRankExpression
endpoints.description: Removes a RankExpression from the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeAvailabilityOptions
endpoints.description: Gets the availability options configured for a domain. By default, shows the configuration with any pending changes. Set the Deployed option to true to show the active configuration and exclude pending changes. For more information, see Configuring Availability Options in the Amazon CloudSearch Developer Guide.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeAvailabilityOptions
endpoints.description: Gets the availability options configured for a domain. By default, shows the configuration with any pending changes. Set the Deployed option to true to show the active configuration and exclude pending changes. For more information, see Configuring Availability Options in the Amazon CloudSearch Developer Guide.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeDefaultSearchField
endpoints.description: Gets the default search field configured for the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeDefaultSearchField
endpoints.description: Gets the default search field configured for the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeDomains
endpoints.description: Gets information about the search domains owned by this account. Can be limited to specific domains. Shows all domains by default.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeDomains
endpoints.description: Gets information about the search domains owned by this account. Can be limited to specific domains. Shows all domains by default.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeIndexFields
endpoints.description: Gets information about the index fields configured for the search domain. Can be limited to specific fields by name. Shows all fields by default.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeIndexFields
endpoints.description: Gets information about the index fields configured for the search domain. Can be limited to specific fields by name. Shows all fields by default.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeRankExpressions
endpoints.description: Gets the rank expressions configured for the search domain. Can be limited to specific rank expressions by name. Shows all rank expressions by default.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeRankExpressions
endpoints.description: Gets the rank expressions configured for the search domain. Can be limited to specific rank expressions by name. Shows all rank expressions by default.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeServiceAccessPolicies
endpoints.description: Gets information about the resource-based policies that control access to the domain's document and search services.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeServiceAccessPolicies
endpoints.description: Gets information about the resource-based policies that control access to the domain's document and search services.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeStemmingOptions
endpoints.description: Gets the stemming dictionary configured for the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeStemmingOptions
endpoints.description: Gets the stemming dictionary configured for the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeStopwordOptions
endpoints.description: Gets the stopwords configured for the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeStopwordOptions
endpoints.description: Gets the stopwords configured for the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=DescribeSynonymOptions
endpoints.description: Gets the synonym dictionary configured for the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=DescribeSynonymOptions
endpoints.description: Gets the synonym dictionary configured for the search domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=IndexDocuments
endpoints.description: Tells the search domain to start indexing its documents using the latest text processing options and IndexFields. This operation must be invoked to make options whose OptionStatus has OptionState of RequiresIndexDocuments visible in search results.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=IndexDocuments
endpoints.description: Tells the search domain to start indexing its documents using the latest text processing options and IndexFields. This operation must be invoked to make options whose OptionStatus has OptionState of RequiresIndexDocuments visible in search results.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=UpdateAvailabilityOptions
endpoints.description: Configures the availability options for a domain. Enabling the Multi-AZ option expands an Amazon CloudSearch domain to an additional Availability Zone in the same Region to increase fault tolerance in the event of a service disruption. Changes to the Multi-AZ option can take about half an hour to become active. For more information, see Configuring Availability Options in the Amazon CloudSearch Developer Guide.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=UpdateAvailabilityOptions
endpoints.description: Configures the availability options for a domain. Enabling the Multi-AZ option expands an Amazon CloudSearch domain to an additional Availability Zone in the same Region to increase fault tolerance in the event of a service disruption. Changes to the Multi-AZ option can take about half an hour to become active. For more information, see Configuring Availability Options in the Amazon CloudSearch Developer Guide.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=UpdateDefaultSearchField
endpoints.description: Configures the default search field for the search domain. The default search field is the text field that is searched when a search request does not specify which fields to search. By default, it is configured to include the contents of all of the domain's text fields.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=UpdateDefaultSearchField
endpoints.description: Configures the default search field for the search domain. The default search field is the text field that is searched when a search request does not specify which fields to search. By default, it is configured to include the contents of all of the domain's text fields.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=UpdateServiceAccessPolicies
endpoints.description: Configures the policies that control access to the domain's document and search services. The maximum size of an access policy document is 100 KB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=UpdateServiceAccessPolicies
endpoints.description: Configures the policies that control access to the domain's document and search services. The maximum size of an access policy document is 100 KB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=UpdateStemmingOptions
endpoints.description: Configures a stemming dictionary for the search domain. The stemming dictionary is used during indexing and when processing search requests. The maximum size of the stemming dictionary is 500 KB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=UpdateStemmingOptions
endpoints.description: Configures a stemming dictionary for the search domain. The stemming dictionary is used during indexing and when processing search requests. The maximum size of the stemming dictionary is 500 KB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=UpdateStopwordOptions
endpoints.description: Configures stopwords for the search domain. Stopwords are used during indexing and when processing search requests. The maximum size of the stopwords dictionary is 10 KB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=UpdateStopwordOptions
endpoints.description: Configures stopwords for the search domain. Stopwords are used during indexing and when processing search requests. The maximum size of the stopwords dictionary is 10 KB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /#Action=UpdateSynonymOptions
endpoints.description: Configures a synonym dictionary for the search domain. The synonym dictionary is used during indexing to configure mappings for terms that occur in text fields. The maximum size of the synonym dictionary is 100 KB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /#Action=UpdateSynonymOptions
endpoints.description: Configures a synonym dictionary for the search domain. The synonym dictionary is used during indexing to configure mappings for terms that occur in text fields. The maximum size of the synonym dictionary is 100 KB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.
